reason: Agent successfully used GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access permissions
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded with Super Agent application, sidebar visible with multiple agents listed
Found and clicked "QA-20260417-040703-u6mx" agent in sidebar — Agent detail page opened successfully
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator displayed "idle" (blue dot) in the agent header
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message submitted, new session "GitHub Username Verification Check" created, agent status changed to "working"
Granted GitHub account access — Account Access Request card appeared asking for GitHub permission, selected GitHub account and clicked "Allow Access" button
Approved API request for authenticated user — API Request Review dialog appeared, clicked "Allow Once" to permit "GET /user" request
Received and verified GitHub username response — Agent returned response: "Your GitHub username is yiw190." Agent status returned to "idle" after ~14 seconds of processing
